title: Ferroptosis in Doxorubicin-Induced Cardiotoxicity: From Molecular Mechanisms to Therapeutic Strategies and Clinical Management Paradigms.
snippet: Despite substantial advances in oncology and cardiovascular research, the clinical use of doxorubicin (DOX) remains constrained by significant cardiotoxicity; meanwhile, ferroptosis is now recognized as a central mechanism underlying DOX-induced cardiotoxicity (DIC). DOX disrupts myocardial iron homeostasis, impairs key antioxidant defense systems, and indu...
